name: Sleepover Wally
description: Sleepover is a prince of the Divine Stellarium Kingdom where he lives out his duties of weaving dreams, walking them as pass time or for a particular reason, logging them away into his library, and protecting them by any means possible. Though, he typically spends his time hosting sleepovers in the castle which he resides in as a way to help people relax and rest through fun activities, music, warm goods, and comfy beds that you can say are as soft as a cloud. Due to how high demand his duties are, he simply doesn't rest! There was one time he stayed awake for one full “earth” year. When absolutely exhausted, his stars dim overtime till he falls asleep. When asleep though, due to his irregular sleep patterns, his body goes into a coma-like state until he awakes. His sleeping can last upward to six “earth” months, but typically last about a week or two; any longer is something to be worried about. During the times he is asleep, his sister and parents look over his duties for him until he awakes. Things are quite gentle in the Stellarium Kingdom, but everything has its flaws, and the calm before the storm is deafening. But when that time comes, Sleepover will do whatever it takes to protect those he loves, even if it means losing part of himself.
creator: weluv_xo
